name: Med Spas
tagline: Med spas booking on Instagram, losing the rest.
display_description: Finds med spas and aesthetics clinics near you running on social posts with no real website — booking through DMs, leaking everyone who wants to book at midnight. A site with online booking and a loyalty program is the upgrade, and it cross-sells straight into Buildout Loyalty.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to a med spa owner who lives on Instagram. Note the real signal — strong reviews, an active following, but no website and no online booking. Make the point that a client ready to book at 11pm has nowhere to go and books a competitor by morning. Offer a booking page and, if it fits, a loyalty program that brings them back. Warm but specific, one ask, no clinical jargon.
